message.content:
Subject: Formal Complaint Regarding Late and Damaged Package

Dear [Company Name] Customer Service Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to formally express my dissatisfaction with the recent delivery of a package that I ordered from your company. The package was not only delivered two weeks later than the expected delivery date but was also found to be damaged upon arrival. This experience has not only been inconvenient but has also caused me significant distress, as the item was essential for a critical purpose.

I ordered the package on [insert date] and was informed that it would be delivered by [insert expected delivery date]. However, as of today, [insert current date], the package has not been delivered, and I have been unable to receive it. When I finally received the package, it was in a severely damaged condition, with [describe the damage, e.g., "the item was broken, the packaging was torn, and the product was not in its original condition"].

I understand that unforeseen circumstances can sometimes affect delivery timelines, but in this case, the delay was excessive and not communicated in a timely manner. Furthermore, the damage to the package was not addressed in a satisfactory manner, and I have not received any resolution or compensation for the inconvenience and loss caused by the damaged item.

As a valued customer, I expect a level of service and reliability that reflects the quality of your products and the professionalism of your company. The fact that the package was both late and damaged is a serious issue that warrants immediate attention and a proper resolution.

I kindly request that you take the following steps to rectify this situation:

1. Provide a full explanation for the delay in delivery.
2. Offer a replacement for the damaged item at no additional cost.
3. Issue a refund for the damaged package, if applicable.
4. Provide a clear timeline for when the replacement will be delivered.
5. Implement measures to prevent
